query: SELECT u.name, u.email, up.assignedBusinessLines, up.territories FROM users u LEFT JOIN userProfiles up ON u.id = up.userId WHERE u.name LIKE '%Lee%' OR u.email LIKE '%lee%' LIMIT 5;
